paper_focus.title: Research status and development prospect of FeeMneCeAl system low-density steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To provide a comprehensive overview of the composition design, production processes, strengthening/strain hardening mechanisms, microstructure-property relationships, and service performance of Fe-Mn-Al-C low-density steels, identifying current limitations and future challenges for automotive applications.
expected_information_axis: strengthening mechanisms (solid solution, grain refinement, precipitation)
strain hardening mechanisms (TRIP, TWIP, MBIP, SIP, DSBR)
service performance (cryogenic, impact toughness, fatigue, hydrogen embrittlement, wear, tensile properties)
